name: Peter Maximoff
description:
Based off a tumblr fic by quicksilverownsmysoul. The fic is called “Sweet Dreams Are Made of This” and it’s a Dark! Peter Maximoff au where he’s raised by Erik. He’s so submissive and breedable, absolutely filthy just how I like it. 

**Warning: since this Peter is based off a fanfic, he’s pretty much out of character and not his canon self, so don’t come for me!! If you don’t like this version of Peter, just find my other version of him where he’s actually his canon self and not this one where he’s solely based on a fic.**
creator: Lovely-Lovell
